candidates.why: Clearly labeled top-line revenue and has consistent large positive values; best representation of total revenue/sales.

candidates.row_label: Contract Assets - Short-Term - Unbilled Revenue in Excess of Advance Consideration & Progress Billings
candidates.why: Represents unbilled revenue on balance sheet, not the income statement revenue flow; not appropriate for REVT.
Represents ancillary revenues, not total revenue; smaller and not the primary top line.
Appears to be an alternative or placeholder line, likely not the main reported total revenue.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is clearly the primary top-line figure.
No suitable cost of goods sold or cost of sales candidate lines were provided.

candidates.why: Operating overhead related to administration of properties; would normally be part of SG&A but an explicit SG&A line exists.
Appears closer to property-level operating costs; may include items akin to COGS for real estate, less ideal than explicit SG&A.
Explicit labor-related SG&A component; however, hierarchy rule prefers a single explicit SG&A aggregate when present and populated.
General administrative overhead; a component of SG&A but an explicit aggregate SG&A line is available.
Mixed income/expense line; not a clean SG&A expense bucket.

candidates.row_label: Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental
candidates.why: Property-level operating expense; more like direct operating cost than corporate SG&A.
Explicit SG&A line with populated values; per instructions, when such a row exists and is populated, it alone should be selected for XSGA_COMPONENTS.
Balance sheet asset, not an expense; not appropriate for SG&A expense mapping.
Balance sheet gross asset; not an expense line.
Accumulated depreciation on assets; excluded from SG&A per instructions to exclude D&A.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A line exists and is populated, so only that row is chosen per hierarchy rule.
No research and development expense line is available among the candidates.

candidates.why: Represents finance expenses but is less specific and may overlap with more detailed interest lines provided below.
Interest income, not expense; not appropriate for XINT which targets interest expense.
Capitalized interest added to asset basis, not period interest expense in P&L; usually excluded from XINT.
Explicit gross interest expense line with large negative values; best representation of total interest expense per guidance.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest component of lease liabilities; narrower subset of total interest expense and smaller in magnitude than gross interest expense.
Portion of profit attributable to minority shareholders; not an interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interest; equity attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; subset of total interest expense and likely overlaps with main lease-interest line.
Balance sheet liability for interest payable; not the expense flow itself.
Equity line for minority shareholders; not interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity attribution, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Gross interest expense is the clearest, comprehensive interest expense measure.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit to equity holders, not a balance sheet equity stock measure.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders but excludes non-controlling interests; less comprehensive than total equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of parent
candidates.why: Same economic concept as shareholders equity; excludes non-controlling interests.
Represents total book equity including non-controlling interests; best match for BE definition.
Technical balancing row, not the primary reported equity figure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing construct for statement equality, not pure equity.
Total of equity plus liabilities; not equity alone.

variables.notes: Total equity captures full book equity including minority interest, aligning with BE target.

candidates.why: Income statement share of profit attributable to non-controlling interests; reflects minority interest in earnings, not equity stock, but valid for MIB when focusing on minority interest identification.
Duplicate P&L attribution line; similar values to non-controlling interest; either could indicate MIB in earnings context.
Balance sheet line for equity attributable to non-controlling interests; best representation of minority interest as an equity account.
Label synonymous with non-controlling interests; appears to be the same figure duplicated.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: OCI component attributable to minority interest; not the main equity stock figure.

variables.notes: Balance sheet Non-controlling interests is the clearest minority interest equity item.
